query:
SELECT 'executado' as tipo, categoriaId, COUNT(*) as linhas, SUM(valorConvertidoBase) as total FROM orcamento_executado_linhas WHERE empresaId = 660003 GROUP BY categoriaId
UNION ALL
SELECT 'planejado' as tipo, categoriaId, COUNT(*) as linhas, SUM(totalAnual) as total FROM orcamento_planejado_linhas WHERE versaoId = 4 GROUP BY categoriaId
ORDER BY categoriaId, tipo;
